{{CargoRelic
|name=Tri-Lion Bronze Candlestick
|class_id=21759
|rank=Blue
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This two-meter-tall masterpiece features three crouching lions with intricately carved muscles and flowing manes, their paws entwined with sacred flame motifs. A radiant symbol of power and light, forged in bronze with unparalleled craftsmanship.
|fame=23
|art=46
|fth=30
|civ=33
|tech=22
|ss1=Per 50k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +2<br>Relic Points: 1500000/1500000
|ss2=Per 50k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +4<br>Relic Points: 1500000/1500000
|ss3=Per 50k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +6<br>Relic Points: 1500000/1500000
|ss4=Per 50k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +10<br>Relic Points: 1500000/1500000
|ss7=Per 50k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +10<br>Relic Points: 1500000/1500000<br>Snail RUSH +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:skill@1123_1_1.png|50px]] Place in Parsian Museum: Parsia exploration, Snail ATK +4
}}
